title: Demo outline
summary: Content stays in slides/. The generator owns shared layout, rendering, and validation.
note: Deck structure stays declarative: slide files describe content, while the runtime handles layout, rendering, and guardrails.

cards.title: Structure
cards.body: Each slide exports a single create function and keeps slide-specific content local.

cards.title: Shared system
cards.body: Theme, helpers, and layout frames define the shared visual system and spacing rules.

cards.title: Output path
cards.body: Build writes a PDF, while geometry, text, and render checks catch drift early.
